summary: C5: server routes — new /api/edges*: GET /api/edges (paginated, filtered, two-chunk enriched), GET /api/edges/:id, POST /api/edges/:id/action. Extend /api/queue render for staged_edges rows.

resolution.note: GET/POST /api/edges* live; queue render shapes context.kind discriminated union; chunks.ts EXISTS gains target_table filter; apply/preview surfaces by_target_table. Smoke-tested mixed-batch end-to-end against shadow DB.
